headline: East Malaysia Flights Cost 3 Times More Per Kilometre
context: Comparative study found average domestic flight costs to East Malaysia are 3 times higher per kilometre than equivalent Peninsula routes.

cards.big: Flights to East Malaysia cost 3 times more per km than Peninsula routes
cards.sub: KL-Kuching averages RM480 while KL-Penang at similar distance costs RM160

cards.big: AirAsia and Malaysia Airlines set 78% of Borneo fares above RM350 one-way
cards.sub: Limited competition with only 2 carriers on most routes enables premium pricing

cards.big: Rural Sarawak routes average RM4.20 per km versus RM1.40 for Peninsula
cards.sub: Mavcom received 2,800 complaints about East Malaysia airfares in 2025

cards.big: MAVCOM proposed fare caps but airlines threatened service cuts
cards.sub: Industry warned mandatory caps would result in frequency reductions on routes

cards.big: Flight costs test whether equal access to affordable travel extends to Borneo
Three times costlier per kilometre — East Malaysia flights impose a geographic tax on Borneo citizens.
